schema.targetId: stable kebab-case id derived from the skill display name
schema.targetName: exact skill display name used by progress keys
schema.levels: object with keys 1, 2, 3; each level contains exactly three required main quests
schema.learningStage: fundamental | dependent; fundamental targets can appear in first rolling daily quests before dependent targets
schema.prerequisiteTargets: array of target references required before dependent target introduction; empty for fundamental targets or not-yet-modeled dependencies
schema.fundamental: boolean; true when the target can be learned immediately without prerequisite skill/tool/talent knowledge and should appear earlier in daily quest rotation
